title: Procedural Generation Deep Dive: Noise, Waves, and Infinite Worlds
description:
An in-depth look at procedural generation techniques for games. We explore Perlin noise, simplex noise, wave function collapse, and how to combine them to create infinite, interesting worlds.

Topics covered:
- What is procedural generation?
- Random vs. procedural
- Perlin noise explained
- Simplex noise implementation
- Wave function collapse
- Combining techniques
- Real-time demo in Godot
